name: Fruited French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the remaining ingredients until smooth.
2. Pour into a shallow pan or bowl.
3. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and lightly oil it.
4. Place the bread in the mixture and turn gently several times to coat well.
5. Place in the skillet and drizzle with any leftover mixture.
6. Cook until lightly browned on both sides.
